meaning: n.栽培葡萄兼葡萄酒酿造者
examples: At the age of twenty-one, Pierre - that was the name he gave the winegrower - had been sent by his father to spend some time with his uncle in Madagascar.
The farmers are just as disgruntled: "Europe was born out of the spirit of wine, " winegrower Rudolf Trossen argued at a public hearing on Wednesday.
